calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd L. Butler. Plaintiff, Thomas P. Square was represented by Judondi Bolden, Esq. and Defendant, Tomi Burge appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties and not read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
